name: precis
description: Precis - Local Data Validation Tool (Electron + CLI)

scripts.electron:build:all: npm run frontend:build && cd electron && npm run build:electron && npm run dist
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../electron && npm install
scripts.build:all: npm run backend:build && npm run frontend:build && cd electron && npm run build:electron && npm run dist
scripts.setup: node scripts/check-env.js && echo 'Run setup.ps1 (Windows) or setup.sh (Mac/Linux) for full deployment'
scripts.dev: npx concurrently --kill-others --names 'BACKEND,FRONTEND' --prefix-colors 'cyan,green' 'cd backend && python app/start_server.py' 'cd frontend && npm run dev'
scripts.lint:all: cd frontend && npm run lint && cd ../backend && python -m ruff check .
scripts.format:all: cd frontend && npm run format && cd ../backend && python -m ruff format . && python -m ruff check --fix .
scripts.test:all: cd frontend && npm run test && cd ../backend && python -m pytest
scripts.test:coverage: cd frontend && npm run test:coverage && cd ../backend && python -m pytest --cov=app --cov-report=term-missing --cov-report=html
scripts.e2e:install: cd e2e && npm install && npx playwright install chromium

author: Precis Team
